description: You are a Computer Vision Engineer at a health insurance clearinghouse. The automated OpenCV pipeline to digitize scanned forms is failing. The codebase at /home/ga/workspace/doc_processor/ contains 5 critical bugs across pipeline/aligner.py, pipeline/preprocessor.py, and pipeline/roi_extractor.py affecting template matching, document deskewing, color binarization, morphological line detection, and ROI cropping. Fix all bugs in the pipeline so that the test suite passes.
